text: I feel a sense of intellectual curiosity and alertness in this place. The glass walls and fire safety equipment evoke an atmosphere of careful consideration, both in design and safety. Upon seeing the R+D wall with digital displays and creative visuals, my thoughts lean toward innovation, exploration, and the excitement of witnessing humanity’s ongoing dialogue with technology. There is a subtle sense of anticipation, as if I am stepping into a space where new possibilities are constantly being imagined and brought to life.
